Bash(cd C:/GitHub/AgentNav && python -c "
import ast, sys

files = [
    'agentnav/server/providers/__init__.py',
    'agentnav/server/providers/base_provider.py',
    'agentnav/server/providers/qwen_provider.py',
    'agentnav/server/providers/gemini_provider.py',
    'agentnav/server/s2_server.py',
    'agentnav/clients/nav2_client.py',
    'agentnav/core/pipeline.py',
    'agentnav/robot/ros_client.py',
]

for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\) as fp:
            ast.parse\(fp.read\(\)\)
        print\('  OK  ' + f\)
    except SyntaxError as e:
        print\('  ERR ' + f + ': ' + str\(e\)\)
        sys.exit\(1\)
print\('All files parsed OK.'\)
")
